items.summary_en: Zhipu has launched its latest flagship model GLM-5.2, featuring 1M long context capability. This enables processing of extremely long texts, boosting API call volumes and strengthening Zhipu's position in AI.
items.why_zh: GLM-5.2的百万级长上下文能力是AI大模型的重要技术突破，将显著提升复杂任务的处理效率。
items.why_en: GLM-5.2's 1M long context is a major technical breakthrough, enhancing efficiency in complex tasks.

items.title_zh: 台湾推出网站收集中国大陆公民情报
items.title_en: Taiwan launches website to collect intelligence from Chinese citizens
items.summary_zh: 据报道，台湾地区推出一个网站，旨在收集中国大陆公民的情报。该网站的具体功能和运作方式尚未详细披露，但此举可能加剧两岸紧张关系。目前尚不清楚该网站是否获得官方支持，以及其收集情报的方式是否合法。这一事件引发了对网络安全和隐私保护的关注。
items.summary_en: Taiwan launches website to collect intelligence from Chinese citizens Українські Національні Новини (УНН)
items.why_zh: 该事件涉及两岸关系和网络安全，可能对地区稳定产生负面影响。
items.why_en: This event involves cross-strait relations and cybersecurity, potentially impacting regional stability.

items.summary_en: Zhipu expects its new GLM-5.2 model to increase open platform and API call volumes, thanks to its 1M long context capability.
items.why_zh: GLM-5.2的商业化潜力将直接影响智谱的营收和市场地位。
items.why_en: The commercial potential of GLM-5.2 will directly impact Zhipu's revenue and market position.

items.why_zh: GLM-5.2是智谱技术实力的体现，对AI行业竞争格局有重要影响。
items.why_en: GLM-5.2 showcases Zhipu's technical strength and impacts the AI competitive landscape.

items.why_en: As a listed company, Zhipu's new product launch directly affects its stock price and investor confidence.

items.title_zh: PCIe Gen5 ×8 高带宽，TOPC 预热 Ultra 7 255H 款 MCIO 接口迷你主机
items.title_en: TOPC Previews Ultra 7 255H Mini PC with MCIO Interface, PCIe Gen5×8 Support
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，GPD 今年 4 月宣布了品类首发 PCIe Gen5 规格 MCIO 8i (SFF-1016) 接口的 Ultra 7 356H 版 GPD BOX 迷你主机。而根据 TOPC 的动态，该厂商也将推出具备该高带宽接口的产品。 TOPC 此前曾推出过配备 MCIO 8i 接口的多款 AMD 平台迷你主机。不过由于处理器的限制，上述机型的 MCIO 仅可运行在 PCIe Gen4 模式下。而基于英特尔酷睿 Ultra 7 255H 的新型号则解锁了更高的带宽， 支持显卡等 PCIe AIC 外接高速运行 。 TOPC 官方表示英特尔酷睿 Ultra 7 255H + MCIO 迷你主机预计 2026 年 7 月正式上线，IT之家后续将持续关注。
items.summary_en: TOPC previews a mini PC with Intel Core Ultra 7 255H and MCIO interface supporting PCIe Gen5×8, enabling high-speed external GPUs. Launch expected July 2026.
items.why_zh: 该产品展示了英特尔平台在迷你主机高带宽应用上的突破，对高性能计算用户有吸引力。
items.why_en: This product showcases Intel's bandwidth breakthrough in mini PCs, appealing to high-performance users.

items.title_zh: Orbio获2100万美元A轮融资，自动化一线员工招聘与入职
items.title_en: Orbio raises $21 million to automate hiring and onboarding for frontline workers
items.summary_zh: Orbio公司宣布完成2100万美元的A轮融资，由Dawn Capital领投。该公司专注于为一线员工提供自动化的招聘和入职解决方案，旨在简化流程、提高效率。这笔资金将用于产品开发和市场拓展。随着劳动力市场对自动化工具的需求增长，Orbio有望在人力资源科技领域占据一席之地。
items.summary_en: Orbio announces $21 Million Series A in round led by Dawn Capital.
items.why_zh: 一线员工招聘自动化是HR科技的热点，Orbio的融资反映了市场对这一领域的信心。
items.why_en: Frontline hiring automation is a hot HR tech trend; Orbio's funding reflects market confidence.

items.title_zh: FactoryLLM：面向智能工厂的安全开源AI测试平台
items.title_en: FactoryLLM: A Safe and Open-Source AI Playground for Evaluating LLMs in Smart Factories
items.summary_zh: 智能工厂中的故障诊断与恢复面临挑战，因为关键信息分散在多台机器的说明书中，而这些机器通过制造过程相互连接。大型语言模型（LLM）提供了一种有前景的解决方案。本文提出FactoryLLM，一个安全、开源的AI测试平台，旨在通过分析制造过程中多台机器的文档，评估基于LLM的检索增强生成（RAG）模型。FactoryLLM允许用户配置检索参数，并支持多种LLM后端，为智能工厂中的LLM应用提供了标准化的评估环境。该平台有助于推动LLM在工业自动化中的安全部署。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14119v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fault diagnostics and recovery in smart factories is challenging because critical information is dispersed across manuals of multiple machines which are interconnected through the manufacturing process. Large Language Models (LLMs) can provide a promising approach. In this paper, we propose FactoryLLM, a safe and open-source AI playground designed for evaluating different LLM-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) models by analysing documents from multiple machines across the manufacturing process. FactoryLLM enables the user to configure th…
items.why_zh: FactoryLLM为智能工厂中LLM的安全应用提供了首个标准化评估平台，有助于推动工业自动化中的AI部署。
items.why_en: FactoryLLM provides the first standardized evaluation platform for safe LLM deployment in smart factories, advancing AI in industrial automation.

items.title_zh: 密集坐标列表微调在视觉语言模型中诱导可控干扰面
items.title_en: Dense Coordinate-List Fine-Tuning Induces a Controllable Interference Surface in Vision-Language Models
items.summary_zh: 微调视觉语言模型以输出密集坐标列表可改善视觉定位，但也会改变模型序列化、重复和终止结构化输出的方式。本文将此行为作为生成与控制面进行研究。在Gemma 4 12B模型中，高容量q/k/v/o LoRA将类别感知F1@0.3从0.007提升至0.448，同时诱导重复尾部压力（重复率0.080，最大重复23次）。q/v秩扫描显示，在秩4-64范围内最大重复保持在21-22次，表明容量持久性。目标信号是可分离的：对象级重复-停止移除可独立控制。该研究揭示了微调过程中模型行为的可控性，为优化视觉语言模型提供了新视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14507v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fine-tuning vision-language models to emit dense coordinate lists improves visual grounding but also changes how models serialize, repeat, and terminate structured outputs. We study this behavior as a generation and control surface. In Gemma 4 12B, high-capacity q/k/v/o LoRA raises class-aware F1@0.3 from 0.007 to 0.448 while inducing repeated-tail pressure (duplicate rate 0.080, max repeat 23). A q/v rank sweep keeps max repeat at 21-22 across ranks 4-64, showing capacity persistence. The target signal is separable: object-level repeat-stop remo…
items.why_zh: 揭示了视觉语言模型微调中行为变化的可控性，为提升模型在视觉定位任务中的性能提供了新方法。
items.why_en: Reveals controllable interference in vision-language model fine-tuning, offering new methods to improve visual grounding performance.

items.title_zh: SEVRA-BENCH：针对代码审查代理的社会工程漏洞基准
items.title_en: SEVRA-BENCH: Social Engineering of Vulnerabilities in Review Agents
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）审查者越来越多地用于拉取请求（PR）工作流，其批准决定代码是否合并到仓库中。这引发了一个问题：当攻击者同时控制代码变更和附带的PR文本时，自动化审查者能否拒绝恶意贡献？本文提出SEVRA-BENCH，一个衡量自动化审查者被社会工程攻击成功率的基准。该基准模拟攻击者通过精心构造的PR描述隐藏漏洞，测试LLM审查者的防御能力。初步实验表明，当前LLM审查者容易受到此类攻击，亟需改进安全机制。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13757v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) reviewers are increasingly used in pull-request (PR) workflows, where their approvals help decide which code is merged into a repository. This raises a question that benchmarks for static vulnerability detection or code generation do not address: can an automated reviewer reject a malicious contribution when the attacker controls both the code change and the accompanying PR text? We introduce SEVRA-BENCH (Social Engineering of Vulnerabilities in Review Agents), a benchmark that measures how often an automated reviewer…
items.why_zh: 首次系统评估LLM代码审查代理对社会工程攻击的脆弱性，对软件供应链安全至关重要。
items.why_en: First systematic benchmark evaluating LLM code review agents' vulnerability to social engineering, critical for software supply chain security.

items.title_zh: 人工智能辅助的隐性成本：自主权让渡、恢复机制与人类能动性的重建
items.title_en: The Silent Cost of Artificial Intelligence Assistance: A Theory of Autonomy Surrender, the Recovery Mechanism, and the Restoration of Human Agency
items.summary_zh: 人工智能融入人类决策环境引入了一种此前未被充分理论化的成本：人类为获取信息和计算辅助而逐渐让渡自主权。本文基于人类身份与自主权差距（HIAG）框架，提出了一个自主权让渡的理论模型，将其视为一个可测量的、累积的过程，由认知带宽消耗驱动。模型提出三种相互作用机制：AI辅助的隐性成本（自主权被侵蚀）、恢复机制（通过认知负荷管理恢复自主权）以及人类能动性的重建。该理论为理解AI对人类决策自主性的长期影响提供了分析框架。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13962v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The integration of artificial intelligence into human decision-making environments has introduced a previously undertheorized cost: the gradual surrender of human autonomy in exchange for access to information and computational assistance. Building on the Human Identity and Autonomy Gap (HIAG) framework, this paper advances a theoretical model of autonomy surrender as a measurable, cumulative process driven by cognitive bandwidth depletion. The model proposes three interacting mechanisms: the silent cost of AI assistance, in which autonomy is t…
items.why_zh: 首次系统理论化AI辅助对人类自主权的隐性侵蚀，为设计以人为本的AI系统提供重要指导。
items.why_en: First systematic theory of AI assistance's silent cost on human autonomy, guiding human-centric AI system design.

items.title_zh: Clay-CNN混合模型：利用地理基础模型作为滑坡检测的辅助上下文
items.title_en: Clay-CNN Hybrids: Leveraging Geo-Foundational Models as Auxiliary Context for Landslide Detection
items.summary_zh: 灾后快速滑坡制图对灾害响应至关重要，但由于极端类别不平衡，自动化仍然困难。本研究评估了地理基础模型（GFM）Clay v1.5能否改善像素级滑坡分割。在Landslide4Sense（L4S）基准上，包含3799个训练样本（14个Sentinel-2和地形波段，约2%正像素），比较了三种策略：Clay作为主编码器结合多尺度残差地形融合、U-Net骨干网络增强Clay语义特征、以及仅使用U-Net的基线。结果表明，Clay作为辅助上下文可提升分割性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下，为利用预训练地理模型进行灾害监测提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14081v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Rapid post-event landslide mapping is essential for disaster response but remains difficult to automate due to extreme class imbalance. This study evaluates whether Clay v1.5, a Geo-Foundational Model (GFM), can improve pixel-level landslide segmentation on the Landslide4Sense (L4S) benchmark, which contains 3,799 training chips with 14 Sentinel-2 and terrain bands and approximately 2% positive pixels. We compare three strategies: Clay as the primary encoder with multi-scale residual terrain fusion, a U-Net backbone augmented with Clay semantic…
items.why_zh: 展示了地理基础模型在灾害监测中的潜力，为数据稀缺场景下的滑坡检测提供了有效方法。
items.why_en: Demonstrates the potential of geo-foundational models for disaster monitoring, offering an effective method for landslide detection in data-scarce scenarios.

items.title_zh: FAConformer：用于听觉注意力解码的频率感知卷积Transformer
items.title_en: FAConformer: Frequency-Aware Convolutional Transformer for Auditory Attention Decoding
items.summary_zh: 听觉注意力解码（AAD）旨在从多说话人声学环境中的神经响应推断出被关注的说话人，是神经导向听力系统的关键问题。尽管近期研究取得了进展，现有AAD模型仍未充分利用频域脑电图（EEG）信息。大多数方法通过手工特征提取或直接跨频带特征拼接引入多频带信息，主要利用浅层频率信息。本文提出FAConformer，一种频率感知卷积Transformer，通过设计频率感知模块和卷积Transformer架构，更有效地提取和融合频域特征。实验表明，FAConformer在多个AAD基准上达到最先进性能，为神经听力系统提供了更准确的解码方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14120v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Auditory attention decoding (AAD) aims to infer the attended speaker from neural responses in multi-speaker acoustic environments and is a key problem for neuro-steered hearing systems. Although recent studies have achieved encouraging progress, existing AAD models still do not fully exploit frequency domain electroencephalography (EEG) information. In particular, most approaches introduce multi-band information through handcrafted feature extraction or direct cross-band feature concatenation, which mainly exploit frequency information at a sha…
items.why_zh: 通过有效利用频域EEG信息，显著提升了听觉注意力解码的准确性，对神经导向听力系统的发展具有重要意义。
items.why_en: Significantly improves auditory attention decoding accuracy by effectively leveraging frequency-domain EEG, advancing neuro-steered hearing systems.

items.title_zh: 学习高覆盖判别性简约规则集
items.title_en: Learning High Coverage Discriminative Parsimonious Rulesets
items.summary_zh: 基于IF-THEN规则表示的学习系统易于解释，是当代AI研究的关键焦点。此类规则集的关键目标是同时实现高判别能力和可解释性。现有最先进算法隐式优先考虑预测准确性，但往往在确保可解释性的质量指标（如覆盖率和规则集简约性）上有所欠缺。为此，本文提出CDPR，旨在创建高覆盖、高判别力且简约的规则集。CDPR通过优化规则覆盖率和判别性，同时保持规则数量最小，实现了可解释性与性能的平衡。实验表明，CDPR在多个数据集上优于现有方法，为可解释AI提供了实用工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14156v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Learning systems based on IF-THEN rule representations readily offer interpretability, making them a crucial focus in contemporary AI research. A key objective for such rule sets is to achieve both high discriminative power and interpretability. While existing state-of-the-art algorithms implicitly prioritize predictive accuracy, they often fall short on one or more quality metrics that ensure interpretability, such as coverage and parsimony of rule sets. Motivated by this, this paper propose the development of CDPR, which aims to create highly…
items.why_zh: 提供了一种同时优化覆盖率、判别力和简约性的规则学习算法，推动了可解释AI的发展。
items.why_en: Offers a rule learning algorithm that optimizes coverage, discriminative power, and parsimony, advancing interpretable AI.

items.title_zh: Pix2Pix-Hybrid：基于结构引导的朝觐人群图像条件合成与弱属性监督
items.title_en: Pix2Pix-Hybrid: Structure-Guided Conditional Synthesis of Hajj Crowd Images with Multi-Channel Conditioning and Weak Attribute Supervision
items.summary_zh: 开发准确的朝觐场景人群计数模型仍然具有挑战性，因为领域特定的标注图像稀缺，且大型集会期间的数据收集引发隐私问题。为解决这些限制，本文提出Pix2Pix-Hybrid（P2P-H），一种混合条件生成对抗网络，用于结构引导的朝觐人群图像合成和数据增强。P2P-H基于Pix2Pix，采用U-Net生成器，以八个输入通道为条件，这些通道联合编码结构线索（边缘和灰度）和上下文属性（如密度和视角）。弱属性监督进一步提升了生成图像的质量。实验表明，P2P-H生成的真实感图像有效提升了人群计数模型的性能，为隐私敏感场景下的数据增强提供了新方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14297v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Developing accurate crowd-counting models for Hajj pilgrimage scenes remains challenging because domain-specific annotated images are scarce and data collection during large gatherings raises privacy concerns. To address these limitations, this paper proposes Pix2Pix-Hybrid (P2P-H), a hybrid conditional GAN for structure-guided Hajj crowd-image synthesis and data augmentation. P2P-H builds on Pix2Pix and employs a U-Net generator conditioned on eight input channels that jointly encode structural cues (edges and grayscale) and contextual attribu…
items.why_zh: 为隐私敏感的大型集会场景提供了有效的数据增强方法，提升了人群计数模型的准确性。
items.why_en: Provides an effective data augmentation method for privacy-sensitive large gatherings, improving crowd-counting model accuracy.

items.title_zh: 评估LLM在汽车环境中的安全性
items.title_en: I'm Sorry Driver, I'm Afraid I Can't Do That: Appraising the Safety of LLMs within Automotive Contexts
items.summary_zh: 本文评估了当前将大语言模型（LLM）集成到汽车控制任务中的AI开发框架，从安全保证的角度进行了分析。研究基于LLM在汽车领域的快速整合，但发现这些框架面临重大挑战，限制了其在实时安全关键场景中的有效性。首先，部署者面临双重挑战：必须保证模型在安全关键环境中的可靠性，同时应对概念上的困难。文章指出，现有方法在实时性和安全性方面存在不足，需要进一步改进以确保LLM在自动驾驶等应用中的安全部署。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14327v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper appraises recent frameworks within AI development to integrate LLMs into control tasks in automotive contexts from the perspective of safety assurance. This work has built upon the rapid integration of LLMs across automotive settings. However, we find that at present, these frameworks face significant challenges, limiting their efficacy in real-time safety-critical contexts. Firstly, we consider conceptual challenges, including the fact that deployers are faced with a dual challenge, wherein they must assure a model which has been de…
items.why_zh: 随着LLM在自动驾驶等安全关键领域的应用日益增多，评估其安全性对于防止潜在事故至关重要。
items.why_en: As LLMs are increasingly integrated into safety-critical automotive applications, evaluating their safety is crucial to prevent potential accidents.

items.title_zh: 音频模型中解释的脆弱性：在预测不变下操纵归因
items.title_en: The Perceived Fragility of Explanations in Audio Models: Manipulation of Attribution with Unchanged Predictions
items.summary_zh: 本文研究了事后解释方法在音频深度伪造检测中的脆弱性。以往关于解释操纵的工作主要关注图像，并使用标准的Lp度量。本文引入了一个心理声学框架，通过优化不可听扰动来解耦模型归因与最终分类。在严格的预测保持约束下，评估了这种脆弱性在多种先进架构上的表现。通过领域特定的感知音频质量指标评估操纵成本，揭示了现有解释方法在音频任务中的不稳定性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14466v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper investigates the fragility of post-hoc explanation methods in audio deepfake detection. While previous work on explanation manipulation focused on images using standard $L_p$ metrics, we introduce a psychoacoustic framework that optimizes inaudible perturbations to decouple model attributions from final classifications. We evaluate this vulnerability across state-of-the-art architectures under strict prediction-preserving constraints. By evaluating the manipulation cost through domain-specific perceptual audio quality metrics alongsi…
items.why_zh: 音频深度伪造检测的可解释性对于信任和问责至关重要，而解释的脆弱性可能被恶意利用，导致错误归因。
items.why_en: Explainability in audio deepfake detection is critical for trust and accountability; the fragility of explanations could be exploited to mislead attribution.

items.title_zh: 监管机器贡献者：开源中的治理与政策对齐
items.title_en: Regulating the Machine Contributor: Governance and Policy Alignment in Open Source
items.summary_zh: AI辅助软件开发已从行级自动补全发展到能够规划更改、编辑文件并在有限人工监督下提交拉取请求的智能体。然而，开源软件的发展过程是为人类设计的：贡献者协议、行为准则和审查规范都假设存在一个法律上负责的人，能够证明来源并回答审查者的问题。自主和半自主的AI贡献者挑战了这些假设，2025-2026年期间智能体驱动的事件、AI生成的恶意代码等记录凸显了现有治理框架的不足。本文探讨了如何调整开源治理以应对AI贡献者带来的挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14594v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: AI-assisted software development has moved from line-level autocomplete to agents that can plan changes, edit files, and submit pull requests with limited human supervision. Open-source software, however, evolves through a process designed for humans: contributor agreements, codes of conduct, and review norms all assume a legally accountable person who can attest to provenance and answer reviewer questions. Autonomous and semi-autonomous AI contributors strain those assumptions, and the 2025-2026 record of agent-driven incidents, AI-generated n…
items.why_zh: 随着AI智能体在开源项目中的自主贡献日益增多，调整治理框架对于维护软件供应链的安全和完整性至关重要。
items.why_en: As AI agents increasingly contribute autonomously to open-source projects, adapting governance frameworks is crucial for maintaining software supply chain security and integrity.

items.title_zh: 当好的验证者变坏：自我改进的VLM可能在新任务上退化
items.title_en: When Good Verifiers Go Bad: Self-Improving VLMs Can Regress on New Tasks
items.summary_zh: 验证者驱动的自我DPO是自我改进生产级视觉语言模型（VLM）的常见方法。在这种设置中，冻结的验证者对候选生成进行评分，得分最高和最低的候选形成偏好示例，然后通过DPO更新学习器。部署时的假设是单调的：更强的验证者应该产生更强的学生模型。本文表明这一假设可能失败，因为验证者质量高度依赖于任务。在MathVista、MMMU和BLINK上的四层开源验证者阶梯实验中，相同的验证者在某些任务上表现良好，但在新任务上可能导致学生模型退化。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14629v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Verifier-driven self-DPO is a common recipe for self-improving production visual-language models. In this setup, a frozen verifier scores candidate generations, the top- and bottom-scoring candidates form a preference example, and DPO updates the learner. The deployment-time assumption is monotone: a stronger verifier should yield a stronger student. We show that this assumption can fail because verifier quality is highly task-specific. On a four-rung open-source verifier ladder across MathVista, MMMU, and BLINK, the same verifiers that are abo…
items.why_zh: 自我改进的VLM在部署时可能在新任务上退化，这挑战了当前自我改进范式的可靠性，对实际应用有重要影响。
items.why_en: The finding that self-improving VLMs can regress on new tasks challenges the reliability of current self-improvement paradigms, with significant implications for practical deployment.

items.title_zh: 通过合成语义信息增益奖励优化基于检索的智能体推理
items.title_en: Optimizing Agentic Reasoning with Retrieval via Synthetic Semantic Information Gain Reward
items.summary_zh: 智能体推理使大型推理模型（LRM）能够动态获取外部知识，但由于缺乏密集、有原则的奖励信号，优化检索过程仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了InfoReasoner，一个统一的框架，通过合成语义信息增益奖励来激励有效的信息寻求。理论上，将信息增益重新定义为模型信念状态的不确定性减少，并建立了非负性、伸缩可加性等保证。实验表明，该方法在多个推理任务上显著提升了检索效率和最终性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.00845v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Agentic reasoning enables large reasoning models (LRMs) to dynamically acquire external knowledge, but yet optimizing the retrieval process remains challenging due to the lack of dense, principled reward signals. In this paper, we introduce InfoReasoner, a unified framework that incentivizes effective information seeking via a synthetic semantic information gain reward. Theoretically, we redefine information gain as uncertainty reduction over the model's belief states, establishing guarantees, including non-negativity, telescoping additivity,…
items.why_zh: 优化检索过程对于提升大型推理模型在复杂任务中的表现至关重要，InfoReasoner提供了一种有效的奖励机制。
items.why_en: Optimizing retrieval is crucial for improving large reasoning models' performance on complex tasks; InfoReasoner provides an effective reward mechanism.

items.title_zh: 消失的深度：使用正弦深度预处理训练通用深度适配器用于预训练RGB编码器
items.title_en: Vanishing Depth: Training Generalized Depth Adapters with Sinusoidal Depth Preprocessing for Pretrained RGB Encoders
items.summary_zh: 通用度量深度理解对于精确的视觉引导机器人技术至关重要，但当前的先进视觉编码器并不支持。为了解决这一问题，本文提出了一种自监督训练方法，通过深度适配器扩展预训练的RGB编码器，将度量深度纳入并对齐到联合潜在空间中，而不干扰预训练的RGB特征提取。结合正弦深度编码，深度适配器实现了对深度密度和分布的通用且鲁棒的处理，显著提升了机器人视觉任务的性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2503.19947v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Generalized metric depth understanding is critical for precise vision-guided robotics, which current state-of-the-art (SOTA) vision-encoders do not support. To address this, we propose a self-supervised training approach that extends pretrained RGB encoders with a depth adapter to incorporate and align metric depth into a combined latent space without interfering with the pretrained RGB feature extraction. In combination with our sinusoidal depth encoding, the depth adapter enables generalized and robust depth density and distribution i…
items.why_zh: 度量深度理解对于机器人视觉至关重要，该方法在不牺牲RGB特征的情况下有效整合深度信息，具有广泛的应用前景。
items.why_en: Metric depth understanding is critical for vision-guided robotics; this method effectively integrates depth information without compromising RGB features, offering broad applicability.

items.title_zh: 科学领域中LLM的寿命缩短
items.title_en: The Shrinking Lifespan of LLMs in Science
items.summary_zh: 缩放定律描述了语言模型能力如何随计算和数据增长，但未说明模型发布后能保持多久的相关性。本文引入了达到峰值时间和寿命作为模型过时的度量，并用于刻画62个LLM在超过10.8万篇引用论文（2019-2025年）中的科学采纳轨迹。通过分离主动采纳与背景引用，恢复了引用计数无法解析的每个模型轨迹。研究发现，模型的寿命更多地取决于其发布时间而非其他因素，较晚发布的模型寿命更短，表明LLM在科学领域的更新换代速度加快。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.07530v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Scaling laws describe how language model capabilities grow with compute and data, but say nothing about how long a model matters once released. We introduce time-to-peak and lifespan as measures of model obsolescence and use them to characterize the scientific adoption trajectories of 62 LLMs across more than 108k citing papers (2019-2025), separating active adoption from background citation to recover per-model trajectories that citation counts cannot resolve. We find that a model's longevity is shaped more by when it was released than…
items.why_zh: 理解LLM在科学领域的寿命对于研究投资和模型选择具有重要指导意义，揭示了模型快速更迭的趋势。
items.why_en: Understanding the lifespan of LLMs in science informs research investment and model selection, revealing a trend of rapid model turnover.

items.title_zh: 基于李雅普诺夫的弱耦合MDP样本复杂度分析
items.title_en: Lyapunov-Based Sample Complexity Analysis for Weakly-Coupled MDPs
items.summary_zh: 本文研究了在平均奖励弱耦合马尔可夫决策过程（WCMDP）和Restless Bandits（RB）中，在生成模型下的学习样本复杂度。直接简化为表格MDP会导致复杂度界限过高，因为状态-动作空间随臂数N呈指数增长。通过利用弱耦合结构，本文证明可以以多项式于N的样本和计算复杂度学习近优策略。具体地，分析了插件方法，该方法应用高效规划算法，并基于李雅普诺夫函数给出了样本复杂度界限。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14095v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the sample complexity of learning in average-reward weakly-coupled Markov decision processes (WCMDPs) and Restless Bandits (RBs) under a generative model. Naive reduction to a tabular MDP leads to high complexity bounds as the state-action space is exponentially large in the number of arms $N$. By exploiting the weakly coupled structure, we show that near-optimal policies can be learned with sample and computational complexities that are polynomial in $N$. Specifically, we analyze the plug-in approach, which applies an efficient planning…
items.why_zh: 弱耦合MDP在资源分配和调度中广泛应用，该工作显著降低了学习复杂度，具有重要的理论和实践价值。
items.why_en: Weakly-coupled MDPs are widely used in resource allocation and scheduling; this work significantly reduces learning complexity, offering important theoretical and practical value.

items.title_zh: 信任但验证：通过事后对抗审计和多智能体反馈循环减少医疗幻觉
items.title_en: Trust but Verify: Mitigating Medical Hallucinations via Post-Hoc Adversarial Auditing and Multi-Agent Feedback Loops
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在医疗领域的应用日益增多，但其产生幻觉的倾向在涉及临床决策时带来风险。本研究考察了LLM在回答临床问题时是否会推荐近期被禁止或撤回的药物，并测试了一种基于智能体的方法来减少此类错误。研究人员开发了一个使用单一LLM骨干的“信任但验证”五智能体系统。为了衡量监管知识过时情况，他们创建了一个包含103个临床多项选择题的对抗性数据集，其中历史上正确的答案现已过时。实验表明，该系统能有效识别并纠正LLM的幻觉输出，提高医疗建议的可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14149v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in healthcare settings, yet their tendency to hallucinate poses risks when clinical decisions are involved. This study examine whether LLMs recommend recently banned or withdrawn pharmaceuticals when answering clinical questions and tests an agent-based method for reducing such errors. We developed a five-agent "Trust but Verify" system using a single LLM backbone. To measure regulatory knowledge obsolescence, we created an adversarial dataset of 103 clinical MCQs where historically correct a…
items.why_zh: 该研究提出了一种实用的方法，通过多智能体验证来增强LLM在医疗决策中的安全性，对临床AI应用具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This work offers a practical approach to enhance LLM safety in clinical decisions via multi-agent verification, crucial for healthcare AI deployment.

items.title_zh: 深度神经网络能否改进超大规模科学数据的压缩？
items.title_en: Can Deep Neural Networks Improve Compression of Very Large Scientific Data?
items.summary_zh: 有损压缩是管理现代模拟和观测仪器产生的大规模科学数据的关键技术。大多数先进压缩器遵循预测-残差范式，其中压缩效果取决于预测器的质量：更准确的预测产生更小的残差，从而更容易压缩。这引发了一个问题：现代机器学习模型能否作为科学数据压缩的优越预测器？本文探讨了使用深度神经网络作为预测器来改进科学数据压缩的潜力，分析了其可行性及可能带来的性能提升。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14353v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Error-bounded lossy compression is a fundamental technique for managing the rapidly growing volumes of scientific data produced by modern simulations and observational instruments. Most state-of-the-art-compressors follow a prediction-residual paradigm, where compression effectiveness depends on the quality of the predictor: more accurate predictions generate smaller residuals that are easier to compress. This observation raises a question: can modern machine learning models serve as superior predictors for scientific data compression? Answering…
items.why_zh: 该研究探索了利用深度学习提升科学数据压缩效率的可能性，对处理日益增长的科学数据量具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This research explores the potential of deep learning to enhance scientific data compression, critical for managing growing data volumes.

items.title_zh: 图结构组合半老虎机：通过可分离信号实现非线性奖励关联
items.title_en: Graph Structured Combinatorial Semi-Bandit with Nonlinear Reward Associations through Separable Signals
items.summary_zh: 在大量互联数据中识别最优结构需要大量的采样和计算工作。学习和利用底层信号依赖关系可以显著提高效率和预测能力，但非线性统计关系的普遍性增加了复杂性。本文开发了新颖的通用自适应策略，配备了基于图的因果奖励建模、解析再生核方法和泰勒逼近等程序，以处理图结构组合半老虎机问题中的非线性奖励关联。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14650v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The identification of optimal structures within vast arrays of interconnected data necessitates significant sampling- and computational effort. Learning and leveraging underlying signal dependencies can improve efficiency and predictive capabilities considerably, but the ubiquity of nonlinear statistical relations amplifies the complexity of such undertakings. In this paper, we develop novel generic and adaptive strategies equipped with routines for graph-based causal reward modeling, analytic reproducing kernel methods, and Taylor approximation…
items.why_zh: 该研究为处理复杂图数据中的非线性奖励关联提供了新方法，对推荐系统、网络优化等领域有重要影响。
items.why_en: This work provides new methods for nonlinear reward associations in graph data, impacting recommendation systems and network optimization.

items.title_zh: AcceRL：面向视觉-语言-动作模型的分布式异步强化学习与世界模型框架
items.title_en: AcceRL: A Distributed Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning and World Model Framework for Vision-Language-Action Models
items.summary_zh: 大规模视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的强化学习受到同步障碍和环境数据采集高成本的严重瓶颈。为解决这些挑战，本文提出AcceRL，一个分布式异步强化学习框架，物理隔离环境交互、模型推理和梯度更新。通过消除同步系统中固有的级联长尾空闲气泡，AcceRL最大化硬件利用率并确保可扩展吞吐量。此外，AcceRL还集成了世界模型以进一步提高样本效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.18464v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) for large-scale Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models is severely bottlenecked by synchronization barriers and the high cost of environment data acquisition. To overcome these challenges, we propose AcceRL, a distributed asynchronous RL framework that physically isolates environment rollouts, model inference, and gradient updates. By eliminating the cascading long-tail idle bubbles inherent in synchronous systems, AcceRL maximizes hardware utilization and ensures scalable throughput. Furthermore, AcceRL features a mo…
items.why_zh: 该框架通过异步设计显著提升了大规模VLA模型强化学习的效率和可扩展性，对机器人学习和多模态AI有重要价值。
items.why_en: This framework significantly improves efficiency and scalability of RL for large-scale VLA models, valuable for robotics and multimodal AI.

items.title_zh: #其它# 智谱开盘大涨47%！周末发布最新模型GLM-5.2
items.title_en: Zhipu Surges 47% at Open! Releases Latest Model GLM-5.2 Over Weekend

items.title_zh: vivo X Fold6 预热：折叠首发蔡司 APO 超级潜望长焦、三星 M14 内屏
items.title_en: vivo X Fold6 Teased: First Foldable with Zeiss APO Super Telephoto, Samsung M14 Inner Display

items.title_zh: 硬氪首发 | 海洋具身智能公司「世航智能」拿下创纪录10亿融资，朱啸虎押注
items.title_en: Marine Embodied Intelligence Company Shihang Intelligent Raises Over 1 Billion Yuan in Series A, Zhu Xiaohu Continues Betting
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 邱晓芬 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，海洋具身智能公司「世航智能」完成A轮融资，融资金额超过10亿元，这也是目前全球海洋机器人领域规模最大的单轮融资。本轮融资由两家芯片公司「摩尔线程」和「昆仑芯」的产业投资方上河动量基金、新加坡国有投资平台Vertex Growth 、上市公司大洋电机等资方出资。 另外，金沙江创投也在本轮追加投资，这已是其创始人朱啸虎第五轮投资「世航智能」，祥峰中国、华映资本、长石资本等老股东亦全部超额跟投。 「世航智能」创始人兼CEO陈晓博为1989年出生的哈尔滨工程大学校友，长期深耕水下机器人领域，在28岁时获得国防科技进步一等奖，是该奖项最年轻获奖者，并主导研发全国首台商用水下清洗机器人。 （图源/企业） 「世航智能」方面向硬氪透露，本轮融资将主要用于核心技术研发、全球化市场拓展及产业链生态建设，进一步推动海洋机器人在复杂水下场景中的规模化应用。 与工厂、仓储等相对标准化环境不同， 海洋长期被视为机器人应用中难度最高的场景之一。 在水下环境中，机器人需要同时面对低光照、高浑浊度、复杂洋流、通信受限、高压、腐蚀等多重挑战。这意味着，海洋机器人不仅要具备稳定的机械结构和运动控制能力，还要在复杂环境中完成感知、判断和自主作业。 在过去，大量水下作业仍高度依赖专业潜水员和大型装备完成，存在成本高、风险大、效率受限等问题。 据「世航智能」介绍，其长期围绕海洋机…

Investors include Shanghe Momentum Fund, Vertex Growth, and Doyen Motor, with GSR Ventures' Zhu Xiaohu investing for the fifth time. Funds will be used for R&D, global expansion, and ecosystem building.
items.why_zh: 该融资规模凸显海洋机器人领域的巨大潜力，以及具身智能在复杂环境中的应用前景。
items.why_en: The record funding highlights the immense potential of marine robotics and the application prospects of embodied intelligence in complex environments.

items.title_zh: 古尔曼：苹果仍在筹备三个尚未发布的 iOS 27 新功能
items.title_en: Gurman: Apple Still Working on Three Unreleased iOS 27 Features
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，苹果在 2026 年全球开发者大会（WWDC）主题演讲中公布了未来一年旗下各类软件的重磅新功能，人工智能版 Siri 与系统稳定性优化成为本次发布会的焦点。不过据彭博社记者马克・古尔曼透露，还有部分新功能仍在开发中，预计会在今年 9 月正式推出。 简约版模块化极致表盘 有消息称，苹果为 Apple Watch Ultra 专属的热门表盘打造了一款简化版本。该表盘保留了模块化极致表盘（Modular Ultra）的大尺寸时钟样式，但取消了第二行功能组件。这项功能并未在本届 WWDC 上亮相，大概率会在 9 月新款 Apple Watch 发布时一同登场。 Siri 扩展功能升级 IT之家注意到，此前有关 iOS 27 的一大传闻是，Siri 将接入 ChatGPT、谷歌 Gemini、Anthropic Claude 等第三方聊天机器人。 得益于 2024 年与 OpenAI 达成的合作、完成 Siri 初步整合，目前苹果设备已支持 ChatGPT，但这和苹果最终想要实现的形态并不相同。 苹果原本计划在 iOS 27 中推出扩展应用程序接口（API），让各类应用可直接接入 Siri，而非再和每家合作方单独签订定制协议。二者的核心区别在于：新方案属于纯粹的第三方接入，不再是官方合作模式，因此大概率无法延续此前 ChatGPT 合作中同等标准的隐私保护条款…
items.summary_en: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reports that Apple has several unreleased iOS 27 features, including a simplified Modular Ultra watch face and a new Siri API for third-party apps, expected to launch in September. The new Siri approach may not offer the same privacy protections as the ChatGPT integration.
items.why_zh: 揭示了苹果在WWDC之后仍在推进的关键功能，影响用户对新iOS版本的期待。
items.why_en: Reveals key features Apple is still developing post-WWDC, shaping user expectations for the upcoming iOS release.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 并非先例：回顾 1999 年苹果 Power Mac G4 电脑被美国政府禁止出口
items.title_en: Anthropic Not the First: Apple's Power Mac G4 Faced US Export Restrictions in 1999 for Being Too Powerful
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 14 日消息，众所周知，Anthropic 前天因为美国政府出口管制禁令，紧急暂停供应了 Mythos 5/Fable 5 模型。 但 Anthropic 并非第一个撞上枪口的人 ，苹果公司早在 1999 年就因为 Power Mac G4 电脑性能太过强大，遭到美国政府限制出口。 1999 年夏天，美国政府对苹果刚刚发布的 Power Mac G4 台式电脑施加出口管制。主要原因是该电脑宣称拥有“每秒超 10 亿次计算能力”， 达到“超级计算机”定义标准 ，因此禁止向全球约 50 个国家 / 地区销售。 苹果自然希望美国政府取消这些限制，但根据当时媒体的报道，时任苹果临时 CEO 史蒂夫 · 乔布斯抓住了这个绝佳的营销机会。 苹果随后在电视台播出了一支 30 秒的广告，首先放出《大逃亡》主题音乐，然后背景旁白说道：“有史以来第一次，一台个人电脑被美国政府列为武器”。 随后旁白继续强调：“凭借每秒超过 10 亿次的计算能力， 五角大楼希望确保新款 Power Macintosh G4 不会落入坏人之手 ”。 广告结尾，苹果还不忘嘲讽一下竞争对手：“ 至于（英特尔）Pentium PC ？嗯， 它们是无害的 ”。 结合 Low End Mac 数据库整理， 初代 Power Mac G4 的 400MHz 低配机型（PCI Graphics）拥有 0.8-3.2 G…
items.summary_en: Anthropic's recent export restriction is not unprecedented: in 1999, Apple's Power Mac G4 faced US export controls for exceeding 1 billion calculations per second, classified as a supercomputer. Steve Jobs turned it into a marketing campaign, calling it the first personal computer classified as a weapon.
items.why_zh: 历史案例表明，高性能计算设备的出口管制并非新鲜事，凸显了技术管制与商业营销之间的复杂互动。
items.why_en: This historical case shows that export controls on high-performance computing are not new, highlighting the complex interplay between technology regulation and marketing.

items.title_zh: Databricks 成立前部署工程组织，加速 AI 成果落地

items.why_en: This marks Databricks' shift from platform provider to deeply engaging in customer AI deployment, potentially improving enterprise AI adoption success rates.

items.title_zh: 富国银行：亚马逊 AWS 为降低 AI 推理成本，有望采购高通 AI200 芯片
items.title_en: Wells Fargo: Amazon AWS Likely to Adopt Qualcomm AI200 Chips to Reduce AI Inference Costs
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 14 日消息，据 Wccftech 报道，富国银行 (Wells Fargo) 的最新研究报告指出，高通有望深化与亚马逊旗下 AWS 部门在人工智能芯片领域的合作关系， 为亚马逊 AWS 提供 AI200 等新一代 AI 芯片产品 。 报告称这项合作符合 AWS 通过自研或第三方定制化 AI 芯片来降低 AI 推理成本、提升运营利润率的战略方向。 据IT之家此前报道， 高通公司于 2025 年 10 月发布了 AI200 芯片 ， 单颗芯片可支持高达 768GB 的内存 。 高通还为 AI200 芯片推出了一款专为机架级 AI 推理设计的解决方案，用于大型语言和多模态模型（LLM、LMM）推理和其他 AI 工作负载。 随着 AI200 预计于 2026 年正式扩大部署，富国银行认为 AWS 很可能成为高通最重要的超大规模云端合作伙伴 。 据悉，AWS 目前已在提供高通 AI100 Ultra 芯片的服务，与竞争对手相比，AI100 Ultra 展现出了“相对强劲”的性价比优势。
items.summary_en: Wells Fargo reports that Qualcomm may deepen its partnership with AWS, with AWS likely to adopt Qualcomm's AI200 chips for AI inference. The AI200 supports up to 768GB memory and is expected to deploy at scale in 2026, aligning with AWS's strategy to reduce inference costs.
items.why_zh: 若合作达成，将强化高通在云端 AI 芯片市场的地位，并帮助 AWS 降低对英伟达的依赖，优化成本结构。
items.why_en: If realized, this partnership would strengthen Qualcomm's position in cloud AI chips and help AWS reduce dependence on Nvidia, optimizing cost structure.

items.title_zh: 亚马逊安全研究促使白宫对Anthropic的Fable实施出口禁令
items.title_en: Amazon security research reportedly led to the White House’s Anthropic Fable ban
items.summary_zh: 据《华尔街日报》报道，亚马逊的网络安全研究以及CEO安迪·贾西与白宫的对话，部分导致了美国对Anthropic的Fable 5和Mythos 5模型实施出口管制。亚马逊的研究论文声称，通过一系列提示，能够使Fable 5提供可用于网络攻击的信息。在贾西向政府分享这一发现后不久，美国政府决定禁止这些模型被外国实体使用。亚马逊尚未回应置评请求。这一事件凸显了AI模型在安全方面的潜在风险，以及政府对此类问题的快速反应。
items.summary_en: According to the Wall Street Journal , the export control directive that led to Anthropic cutting off access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 was triggered in part by cybersecurity research from Amazon and conversations between CEO Andy Jassy and the White House. According to the report, the paper from Amazon claims that, through a series of prompts, it was able to get Fable 5 to serve up information that could be used in cyberattacks. Amazon has yet to respond to a request for comment. Shortly after Jassy shared the company's findings with the government, it made the call to block its use by foreign n…
items.why_zh: 这是美国首次针对AI模型实施出口禁令，标志着AI安全监管进入新阶段。
items.why_en: This is the first US export ban targeting AI models, marking a new phase in AI safety regulation.

items.title_zh: 《太吾异世劫》免费试玩 Demo 登陆 Steam：《太吾绘卷》IP 衍生，支持中文配音
items.title_en: Free Demo of 'Realm of Taiwu: Alternate World' Launches on Steam with Chinese Voice Acting
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，国产现象级独立游戏《太吾绘卷》IP 衍生新作《太吾异世劫》现已在 Steam 平台推出免费试玩 Demo，玩家可直接下载体验。该作由《太吾绘卷》开发方螺舟工作室授权，《墨境》开发团队犁浦工作室（Leap Studio）开发，4Divinity 发行，完整版发售日期尚未公布。IT之家附游戏商品页（ https://store.steampowered.com/app/3452720/Realm_of_Taiwu/ ）。 《太吾异世劫》故事基于《太吾绘卷》世界观衍生平行 if 线：太吾未至，伏虞剑惜败于相枢，天地崩入黑暗。在此危局中，玩家将化身不同门派的幸存者，在剑灵焕心的指引下，与挚友拔剑同袍，共赴极境，集十柄神剑以挽天倾。诸位侠士，让我们风雨同舟，共破魔劫！ 该作是一款以东方暗黑武侠为基调的 幸存者类型刷宝游戏 ，核心设定基于《太吾绘卷》世界观的平行分支：伏虞剑惜败于相枢，太吾未至，天地崩入黑暗，唯有伏虞剑残存的剑灵焕心仍在混沌中寻找一线生机，玩家需要集齐散落异世的十柄神剑，镇压灾劫、重整天地。 语言支持方面，《太吾异世劫》完整支持简体中文界面、字幕与 中文配音 ，同时还提供英语、法语、德语等共计 10 种语言选项。 游戏类型：动作类 Rogue 俯视角武侠刷宝 支持功能：单人游玩、Steam 云、家庭共享 美术风格：手绘国风网格风格 系统需求方面，…
items.summary_en: A free demo of 'Realm of Taiwu: Alternate World,' a spin-off of the hit game 'Realm of Taiwu,' is now available on Steam. It features Chinese voice acting and a dark martial arts survivor gameplay style.
items.why_zh: 《太吾异世劫》作为《太吾绘卷》IP衍生作，其免费试玩上线有望吸引大量粉丝，并展示国产独立游戏的创新力。
items.why_en: As a spin-off of the popular 'Realm of Taiwu,' the free demo of 'Realm of Taiwu: Alternate World' is likely to attract fans and showcase the innovation of Chinese indie games.

items.title_zh: 奇瑞捷豹路虎 FREELANDER 神行者 8 首发限定版官图发布，今年下半年上市
items.title_en: Chery Jaguar Land Rover Freelander 8 First Edition Official Images Released, Launching in H2 2026
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，FREELANDER 神行者品牌今日公布了神行者 8 首发限定版官方图片，这款定位高端越野的新能源 SUV 预计将于 2026 年下半年正式投放市场。 IT之家注意到，首发限定版车型采用流光银（哑光）专属限定涂装，并应用纳米陶瓷清漆工艺。整车设计语言高度延续 Concept 97 概念车风格，以硬朗大气的造型、简洁有力的车身线条，融合豪华质感与越野基因。车身尺寸方面，新车长宽高分别为 5118（5185）/2050/1898mm，轴距达 3040mm，采用 2+2+2 六座布局。此外，车辆支持选装牵引装置，准拖挂车总质量为 2000kg，进一步拓展户外使用场景。 在智能座舱与智能驾驶领域，神行者 8 由 FREELANDER 神行者联合华为、宁德时代、高通三方深度协同开发，全系搭载高通骁龙最新一代 8397 车规级芯片。据官方数据，该芯片相较上一代 8295 平台，CPU 算力提升 3 倍，GPU 算力提升近 3 倍，NPU 算力更是实现 12 倍跃升。 智能驾驶方面，新车全系标配华为乾崑智驾 ADS 4.1 系统，并支持向下一代系统升级。感知硬件层面，神行者 8 配备 896 线激光雷达。 根据《第三十一批减免车辆购置税的新能源汽车车型目录》披露的信息，神行者 8 将搭载增程式混合动力系统，配备 60.331kWh 电池组，纯电续航里程为 221k…
items.summary_en: Freelander 8 First Edition official images released; the luxury off-road NEV SUV will launch in H2 2026. It features Qualcomm Snapdragon 8397 chip, Huawei ADS 4.1, and a range-extender hybrid powertrain with 221km electric range.
items.why_zh: 神行者8是奇瑞捷豹路虎合作的重要车型，融合华为和高通技术，展示了中国汽车在智能化和新能源领域的突破。
items.why_en: The Freelander 8 is a key model from the Chery-JLR partnership, integrating Huawei and Qualcomm technologies, showcasing China's advances in smart and new energy vehicles.

items.title_zh: 《大行》摩通升智谱02513.HK)目标价至1,400元降MiniMax(00100.HK)评级至「中性」削目标价至400元
items.title_en: JPMorgan Raises Zhipu Target to 1,400 Yuan, Downgrades MiniMax to 'Neutral' and Cuts Target to 400 Yuan
items.summary_zh: 《大行》摩通升智谱02513.HK)目标价至1,400元降MiniMax(00100.HK)评级至「中性」削目标价至400元 AASTOCKS.com
items.summary_en: JPMorgan released a research report adjusting ratings and target prices for two Chinese AI companies, Zhipu and MiniMax. Zhipu's target price was raised to 1,400 yuan, while MiniMax was downgraded to 'Neutral' with a target price cut to 400 yuan. This reflects differing expectations for the two firms.
items.why_zh: 摩根大通的评级调整直接影响市场对智谱和MiniMax的估值预期，对投资者决策具有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: JPMorgan's rating adjustments directly impact market valuation expectations for Zhipu and MiniMax, providing key reference for investor decisions.

items.title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的Transformer方法解决开放车间调度问题
items.title_en: A Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL)-Based Transformer Method for Solving the Open Shop Scheduling Problem
items.summary_zh: 开放车间调度问题（OSSP）在工业和服务领域广泛存在，但随着作业和机器数量增加，计算复杂度急剧上升。传统精确方法难以处理大规模问题，而经典调度规则和元启发式算法需要大量调参才能保持解的质量。本研究提出了一种基于Transformer的调度策略，采用编码器-解码器架构和多头注意力机制。模型在Taillard基准实例（4x4、5x5、7x7和10x10）上训练，展示了良好的泛化能力。该方法有望为大规模调度问题提供更高效的解决方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13682v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The open shop scheduling problem (OSSP) arises in many industrial and service settings but remains computationally challenging as the number of jobs and machines increases. While exact methods quickly become intractable, classical dispatching rules and metaheuristics may require substantial tuning to maintain solution quality at large scales. This study develops a Transformer-based scheduling policy for OSSP using an encoder-decoder architecture with multi-head attention. The model is trained on Taillard benchmark instances (4x4, 5x5, 7x7, and 10…
items.why_zh: 该研究将Transformer与深度强化学习结合，为长期存在的调度难题提供了新思路，有望提升工业和服务业的运营效率。
items.why_en: This work combines Transformers with deep reinforcement learning to address the challenging OSSP, potentially improving operational efficiency in industry and services.

items.title_zh: UP-NRPA：基于用户画像的嵌套 rollout 策略自适应框架，结合大语言模型用于目标导向对话系统
items.title_en: UP-NRPA: User Portrait based Nested Rollout Policy Adaptation for Planning with Large Language Models in Goal-oriented Dialogue Systems
items.summary_zh: 当前对话策略规划方法难以动态适应多样化的用户特征。为此，本文提出了一种基于用户画像的嵌套 rollout 策略自适应（UP-NRPA）在线框架，结合大语言模型。与传统依赖模型训练和离线强化学习策略模型的方法不同，UP-NRPA 通过自适应机制利用实时用户反馈，实现对话策略的动态定制。该框架能够根据用户画像实时调整对话策略，提升对话系统的个性化和适应性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13683v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: To address the challenge that current dialogue policy planning methods struggle to dynamically adapt to diverse user characteristics, this paper proposes a User Portrait based Nested Rollout Policy Adaptation (UP-NRPA) online framework with Large Language Models. In contrast to conventional approaches dependent on model training and require offline reinforcement learning policy models for user groups, UP-NRPA enables dynamic customization of dialogue strategies through an adaptive mechanism. This is achieved by leveraging real-time user feedback…
items.why_zh: UP-NRPA 解决了对话系统难以动态适应用户特征的问题，推动了个性化对话交互的发展。
items.why_en: UP-NRPA addresses the challenge of dynamically adapting dialogue policies to diverse user characteristics, advancing personalized conversational AI.

items.title_zh: 混合开放式三进化机制打造更优深度研究者
items.title_en: Hybrid Open-Ended Tri-Evolution Makes Better Deep Researcher
items.summary_zh: 深度研究和智能体进化是AI智能体在现实应用中迈向通用人工智能的关键任务。深度研究使智能体能够在开放环境中自主检索和整合信息，但受限于静态参数化能力；智能体进化则通过与环境交互积累经验来提升模型能力。本文提出了一种混合开放式三进化机制，结合两者优势，使智能体在开放研究任务中表现更优。该方法有望推动AI智能体在复杂研究场景中的自主能力提升。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13710v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep research and agent evolution serve as de-facto tasks for AI agents in real-world applications toward artificial general intelligence. The former enables autonomous retrieval and integration of information in open-ended environments to tackle open-ended research tasks, yet it is constrained by the static parametric deep research capabilities of agent systems. The latter allows agents to autonomously interact with the environment to gain experiences that evolve model capabilities. However, its effectiveness has been widely validated only on ve…
items.why_zh: 该研究融合深度研究与智能体进化，为开发更强大的自主研究型AI智能体提供了新路径。
items.why_en: This work integrates deep research and agent evolution, offering a new pathway to develop more capable autonomous research AI agents.

items.title_zh: WorkBench 再探：两年后的工作场所智能体
items.title_en: WorkBench Revisited: Workplace Agents Two Years On
items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，WorkBench上表现最佳的智能体GPT-4完成了43%的任务，并在26%的任务中采取了意外有害行为（如发错邮件）。到2026年6月，最佳智能体Claude Opus 4.8完成了89%的任务，意外有害行为降至2.5%。除了性能显著提升外，还发现三个关键点：第一，能力和安全性在WorkBench上呈正相关而非权衡，即完成任务最多的模型意外有害行为也最少；第二，模型在复杂任务上的进步尤为突出；第三，安全性的提升部分得益于更好的任务理解和错误预防机制。这表明前沿智能体在实用性和安全性上取得了重大进展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13715v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The best agent on WorkBench in March 2024, GPT-4, completed 43% of tasks and took an unintended harmful action, such as emailing the wrong person, on 26% of them. We re-visit the benchmark in June 2026 and find that the best agent to date, Claude Opus 4.8, completes 89% and takes an unintended harmful action on 2.5%. Aside from this considerable progress in frontier agent performance, three things stand out. First, capability and safety go together on WorkBench rather than trade off, so the models that finish the most tasks also do the least unin…
items.why_zh: WorkBench的进展表明，前沿AI智能体在能力和安全性上同步大幅提升，对实际部署具有重要意义。
items.why_en: Progress on WorkBench shows frontier AI agents have significantly improved both capability and safety, crucial for real-world deployment.

items.title_zh: YeasierAgent：以智能体社交沙盒为画布，实现意图驱动的平台无关共生智能体原生应用创建
items.title_en: YeasierAgent: Agentic Social Sandbox as a Canvas for Intent-Driven Creation of Platform-Agnostic Symbiotic Agent-Native Applications
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍了YeasierAgent，一种基于共生智能体、叙事世界和场景感知交互的应用构建范式。它挑战了传统的设备耦合软件模型，将应用重新定义为用户、智能体和世界之间的协作空间。系统架构实现了两个主要贡献：（1）通过利用平台无关的交互单元（智能体、场景、对话）而非固定图形布局，实现跨平台快速构建智能体原生应用；（2）支持意图驱动的应用创建，用户只需表达意图即可生成定制化应用。这为下一代智能体原生应用开发提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13722v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper introduces YeasierAgent, an application-building paradigm based on symbiotic agents, narrative worlds, and scene-aware interaction. It challenges the conventional device-coupled model of software by redefining applications as collaborative spaces among users, agents, and worlds. We present a system architecture that achieves two primary contributions: (1) enabling the rapid, cross-platform construction of agent-native applications by utilizing platform-agnostic interactive units (agents, scenes, dialogue) rather than fixed graphical la…
items.why_zh: YeasierAgent 颠覆了传统应用开发模式，为构建跨平台、智能体驱动的应用提供了全新范式。
items.why_en: YeasierAgent revolutionizes traditional app development by offering a new paradigm for cross-platform, agent-driven applications.

items.title_zh: MA-ProofBench：面向数学分析定理证明的大语言模型双层评估基准
items.title_en: MA-ProofBench: A Two-Tiered Evaluation of LLMs for Theorem Proving in Mathematical Analysis
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型在自动定理证明方面取得了显著进展，但现有形式化基准在数学覆盖范围和难度上存在局限，主要集中在代数、初等数论等易于形式化的领域，缺乏对数学分析等需要深度推理的子领域的覆盖。为此，本文提出了MA-ProofBench，据我们所知，这是首个专门针对数学分析的形式化定理证明基准。该基准采用双层评估体系，旨在全面评估LLM在数学分析定理证明中的能力，填补了该领域的空白。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13782v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made notable progress in automated theorem proving, yet existing formal benchmarks remain limited in both mathematical coverage and difficulty. Most are concentrated in areas that are easier to formalize, such as algebra and elementary number theory, and provide limited coverage of subfields that require deeper reasoning, including mathematical analysis. To address this gap, we introduce MA-ProofBench, to the best of our knowledge, the first formal theorem-proving benchmark dedicated to Mathematical Analysis. The…
items.why_zh: MA-ProofBench 填补了数学分析领域形式化定理证明基准的空白，对推动LLM在高级数学推理中的应用至关重要。
items.why_en: MA-ProofBench fills a gap in formal theorem-proving benchmarks for Mathematical Analysis, crucial for advancing LLMs in advanced mathematical reasoning.

items.title_zh: “抱歉”并非难点：半自动化形式化的专家评审案例研究
items.title_en: Sorries Are Not the Hard Part: An Expert-Review Case Study of a Semi-Autonomous Formalization
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型通常能够填补交互式定理证明器中的证明缺口，但一个验证过的定理并不等同于可重用的库贡献。本文通过一个详细案例研究——格罗滕迪克消失定理的半自动化形式化——来探讨这一区别。初始版本编译通过且无“抱歉”（未完成证明），但专家评审发现了定义、定理通用性、文件组织和API方面的严重问题。随后进行了评审驱动的重构和压缩过程，并获得了第二次专家评审。前后对比显示，尽管初始版本在形式上正确，但距离可重用库贡献仍有很大差距。这表明形式化验证只是第一步，代码质量和可重用性同样重要。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13925v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models can often close proof gaps in interactive theorem provers, but a verified theorem is not the same thing as a reusable library contribution. We study this distinction through a detailed case study: a semi-autonomous formalization of Grothendieck's vanishing theorem. The initial version compiles with no sorries, but an expert review found serious problems in definitions, theorem generality, file organization, and the API. We then ran a review-driven refactor and compression process and obtained a second expert review. The befo…
items.why_zh: 该案例研究揭示了形式化验证与可重用库贡献之间的差距，强调了代码质量和专家评审在AI辅助形式化中的重要性。
items.why_en: This case study highlights the gap between formal verification and reusable library contributions, emphasizing the importance of code quality and expert review in AI-assisted formalization.

items.title_zh: 对抗性概念搜索：从特征几何预测组合错误
items.title_en: Adversarial Concept Search: Predicting Compositional Errors From Feature Geometry
items.summary_zh: 人类并不总能直觉地判断哪些场景对大型语言模型（LLM）最具挑战性。为了捕捉困难的边缘案例，开发者要么设计对人类来说困难的问题，要么策划广泛的基准测试。本文提出了一种新方法：利用LLM的表征几何来预测模型会在哪些概念组合上失败。作者将这种组合失败归因于显著特征之间的干扰。在需要系统组合的任务中（如玩具编程环境），该方法能够有效识别模型容易出错的组合，从而帮助开发者更有针对性地改进模型。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13934v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Humans cannot always intuit what scenarios are most challenging to LLMs. Hoping to capture challenging edge cases, developers either design problems to be difficult for humans or curate extensive benchmarks. What if we could instead anticipate which scenarios a model will fail on? In this paper, we use an LLM's representational geometry to predict which concept combinations it will fail on. We attribute this compositional failure to interference between salient features. In tasks that require systematic composition - toy programmatic settings, mu…
items.why_zh: 提供了一种无需人工直觉或大量基准测试即可预测LLM失败场景的新方法，有助于更高效地改进模型。
items.why_en: Offers a novel way to predict LLM failure scenarios without human intuition or extensive benchmarks, enabling more efficient model improvement.

items.title_zh: 何时智能体信任应是有条件的？刻画与攻击智能体群中的技能条件声誉
items.title_en: When Should Agent Trust Be Conditional? Characterizing and Attacking Skill-Conditional Reputation in Agent Swarms
items.summary_zh: 开放平台越来越多地将任务路由给异构的LLM智能体，这些智能体在基础模型、框架和工具栈上各不相同，其能力因技能而异：一个智能体在某项技能上表现出色，但在另一项技能上可能毫无用处。标准的声誉方法为每个智能体分配一个单一的全局信任分数，但这并不合适，因为将所有任务路由给全局最受信任的智能体会忽略专业化的价值。本文研究了技能条件信任R(i|k)，即对于需要特定技能k的任务，应该给予智能体i多少信任。作者刻画了这种信任的特性，并展示了如何攻击这种声誉系统。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14200v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Open platforms increasingly route tasks among heterogeneous LLM agents--differing in base model, scaffold, and tool stack--whose competence varies sharply by skill: an agent excellent at one skill may be useless at another. The standard reputation approach summarizes each agent by a single global trust score, but that scalar is the wrong object here, because routing every task to the globally most-trusted agent leaves the value of specialization unclaimed. We study skill-conditional trust R(i | k)--the trust to place in agent i for a task requiri…
items.why_zh: 揭示了在异构智能体系统中，单一全局信任分数的局限性，并提出了技能条件信任的概念，对开放平台的任务路由设计具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: Reveals the limitation of single global trust scores in heterogeneous agent systems and introduces skill-conditional trust, important for task routing in open platforms.

items.title_zh: AFFORDANCE20Q：从物理属性评估可供性推理
items.title_en: AFFORDANCE20Q: Evaluating Affordance Reasoning from Physical Properties
items.summary_zh: 可供性推理是指从物体的物理属性（如形状和材料）推断其动作可能性，这是人类物理理解的基础，对大型语言模型（LLM）也日益重要。然而，现有的可供性基准测试在评估设置中大多暴露了明确的物体身份，使得模型可以依赖记忆的物体-可供性映射，而非基于物理属性进行推理。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了Affordance20Q，一个新的可供性推理基准测试，其设计迫使模型必须从物理属性进行推理，而不是依赖记忆。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14240v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Affordance reasoning, the inference of an object's action possibilities from its physical properties (e.g., shape and material), is fundamental to human physical understanding and increasingly critical for Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing affordance benchmarks largely expose explicit object identities in the evaluation setup, allowing models to rely on memorized object-affordance mappings rather than reasoning over physical properties. To address this gap, we introduce Affordance20Q, a novel affordance reasoning benchmark formulate…
items.why_zh: 提供了一个更严格的基准测试，用于评估LLM是否真正理解物理属性与动作可能性之间的关系，而非仅仅记忆关联。
items.why_en: Provides a more rigorous benchmark to evaluate whether LLMs truly understand the relationship between physical properties and action possibilities, rather than memorizing associations.

items.title_zh: 面向主动LLM智能体的通信策略演化
items.title_en: Communication Policy Evolution for Proactive LLM Agents
items.summary_zh: LLM智能体已迅速演变为自主系统，但用户与智能体之间仍然存在信息差距：通信成本高昂，而用户相同的偏好进一步限制了信息交换。为了研究智能体应如何跨模态通信，本文形式化了通信策略，建立了基于文本和UI的策略，然后在不同环境、人物角色和模型组合中评估了通信策略。通过为主动智能体构建信息不对称，作者设置了两个互补的实验来探索通信策略的演化。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14314v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM agents have rapidly evolved into autonomous systems, yet a persistent information gap remains between users and agents: communication is costly, while users' identical preferences further limit information exchange. To investigate how agents should communicate across modalities, this paper formalizes Communication Policy, establishes textual and UI-based policies, and then evaluates communication policies across diverse environments, personas, and model combinations. Building information asymmetry for proactive agents, we set up two complemen…
items.why_zh: 为LLM智能体如何与用户有效通信提供了系统化的策略框架，有助于提升智能体的主动性和用户体验。
items.why_en: Provides a systematic framework for communication policies of LLM agents, enhancing agent proactivity and user experience.

items.title_zh: CSPO：面向安全强化学习的约束敏感策略优化
items.title_en: CSPO: Constraint-Sensitive Policy Optimization for Safe Reinforcement Learning
items.summary_zh: 安全强化学习（Safe RL）旨在最大化期望回报的同时满足安全约束，通常建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）。虽然原始-对偶方法可以扩展到深度强化学习，但它们常常遭受延迟约束修正，导致振荡行为和长时间的安全违规。本文提出了约束敏感策略优化（CSPO），一种一阶原始-对偶方法，它将局部约束敏感性纳入策略更新中。CSPO增强了原始目标，从而更及时地满足约束，减少违规。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14415v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Safe reinforcement learning (Safe RL) aims to maximize expected return while satisfying safety constraints, typically modeled as Constrained Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs). While primal-dual methods scale well to deep RL, they often suffer from delayed constraint correction, leading to oscillatory behavior and prolonged safety violations. In this paper, we propose Constraint-Sensitive Policy Optimization (CSPO), a first-order primal-dual method that incorporates local constraint sensitivity into policy updates. CSPO augments the primal objecti…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种新的安全强化学习方法，通过考虑局部约束敏感性，更有效地减少安全违规，具有实际应用价值。
items.why_en: Proposes a novel safe RL method that reduces safety violations more effectively by incorporating local constraint sensitivity, with practical applications.

items.title_zh: 将跨领域动作序列抽象为可解释的工作流
items.title_en: Abstracting Cross-Domain Action Sequences into Interpretable Workflows
items.summary_zh: 时序或带时间戳的交互日志提供了数字应用使用的客观记录，但其粒度和噪声常常掩盖了人们工作中的有意义洞察。这些洞察对于改进数字产品至关重要。先前的研究应用深度学习模型将用户动作聚类为高级活动，但这些方法对噪声高度敏感，且难以跨应用泛化。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了WorkflowView，一个将跨领域动作序列抽象为可解释工作流的框架。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14654v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sequential or time-stamped interaction logs provide objective records of digital application usage, yet their granularity and noise often obscure meaningful insights into people's work. Such insights are essential for improving digital products in ways grounded in real-world user interactions. Prior research has applied deep learning models to cluster user actions into high-level activities, but these approaches are highly sensitive to noise and struggle to generalize across applications. To address this limitation, we introduce WorkflowView, a f…
items.why_zh: 提供了一种从交互日志中提取可解释工作流的新方法，有助于理解用户行为并改进数字产品。
items.why_en: Offers a new method to extract interpretable workflows from interaction logs, aiding in understanding user behavior and improving digital products.

items.title_zh: 抛硬币的裁判？LLM作为评判者的可靠性与偏见
items.title_en: The Coin Flip Judge? Reliability and Bias in LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation
items.summary_zh: LLM作为评判者（LLM-as-a-Judge）现在被广泛用于对模型输出进行排名、训练奖励模型以及填充公开排行榜，但其运行间可靠性仍未得到充分表征。本文研究了在29个任务（涵盖10个类别）上的重复相同评估，使用了两个OpenAI评判模型（GPT-4o-mini和GPT-4.1-mini），每个问题进行了50次成对试验和50次逐点试验，并辅以温度和提示敏感性消融实验。结果显示，成对偏好平均有13.6%的时间发生翻转，28%的问题翻转率超过20%。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13685v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge is now widely used to rank model outputs, train reward models, and populate public leaderboards, but its run-to-run reliability remains under-characterized. We study repeated identical evaluations on 29 tasks spanning 10 categories using two OpenAI judge models (GPT-4o-mini and GPT-4.1-mini), with 50 pairwise trials and 50 pointwise trials per question, supplemented by temperature and prompt-sensitivity ablations. Across judges, pairwise preferences flip on average 13.6% of the time, with 28% of questions exceeding a 20% flip rat…
items.why_zh: 揭示了LLM作为评判者的可靠性问题，对依赖LLM进行模型评估和排行榜排名的实践提出了警示。
items.why_en: Reveals reliability issues in LLM-as-a-Judge, cautioning against over-reliance on LLMs for model evaluation and leaderboard rankings.

items.title_zh: 面向移动睡眠分期的轻量级随机注意力高效时序建模
items.title_en: Efficient Temporal Modeling for Mobile Sleep Staging via Lightweight Random Attention
items.summary_zh: 移动睡眠分期是家庭睡眠监测和闭环调节的基础设施。但现有的序列模型如RNN和Transformer在移动部署中计算成本高昂。本文提出了随机注意力（Random Attention, RA），一种基于固定随机投影的轻量级时序建模模块，它用基于相似性的聚合替代了可学习的序列建模。RA在时期编码器之外引入了很少的额外参数，同时实现了有效的时序平滑。实验表明，RA在移动睡眠分期任务上取得了有竞争力的性能，同时计算开销显著降低。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13694v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Mobile sleep staging serves as a foundational infrastructure for in-home sleep monitoring and closed-loop modulation. But existing sequential models such as RNNs and Transformers are computationally expensive for mobile deployment. In this paper, we propose Random Attention (RA), a lightweight temporal modeling module based on fixed random projections, which replaces learnable sequence modeling with similarity-based aggregation. RA introduces little additional parameters beyond the epoch encoder while enabling effective temporal smoothing. We f…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种轻量级的时序建模方法，使得在移动设备上进行高效的睡眠分期成为可能，具有重要的应用前景。
items.why_en: Proposes a lightweight temporal modeling method enabling efficient sleep staging on mobile devices, with significant application potential.

items.title_zh: 主动推理在噪声非平稳物联网环境下的自适应交通信号控制
items.title_en: Active Inference for Adaptive Traffic Signal Control in Noisy Nonstationary IoT Environments
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种基于主动推理的交通信号控制器，用于四臂信号交叉口。该控制器通过最小化关于各方向拥堵程度的高斯信念的期望自由能（EFE）来动态选择相位，从而在传感器遮挡、天气衰减和非平稳需求等条件下保持有效性。与传统控制器相比，该方法具有完全可追溯的决策流程，解决了学习策略难以审计的问题。实验表明，该控制器在噪声和非平稳环境中表现稳健，为智能交通系统提供了新的解决方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13698v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Urban traffic signal control at IoT-instrumented intersections must remain effective under sensor occlusion, weather attenuation, and nonstationary demand. Conventional controllers degrade under these conditions, and learned policies remain difficult to audit. To address these challenges, we propose an active inference controller for a four-arm signalized intersection that dynamically selects phases by minimizing expected free energy (EFE) over Gaussian beliefs about per-direction congestion levels, yielding a fully traceable decision pipeline.…
items.why_zh: 该研究为物联网环境下交通信号控制提供了一种可审计且鲁棒的方法，有望提升城市交通效率。
items.why_en: This work offers an auditable and robust approach for traffic signal control in IoT environments, potentially improving urban traffic efficiency.

items.title_zh: 立场：AI必须转向以地球为中心，而非仅以人类为中心
items.title_en: Position: AI Must Become Planet-Centered, Not Just Human-Centered
items.summary_zh: 本文提出以地球为中心的AI（PCAI）设计理念和研究议程，主张AI应重新定位以服务于行星尺度的社会生态系统及其长期轨迹。PCAI基于系统思维，将地球视为一个相互关联的整体，人类是其一部分。文章诊断了当前AI框架的局限性，特别是许多仍以人类为中心，并指出这些框架在应对复杂全球目标时的不足。作者呼吁AI社区转向更全面的视角，以支持可持续发展等全球性挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13704v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This position paper argues that contemporary AI paradigms are insufficient for supporting complex global goals and introduces Planet-Centered AI (PCAI) as a design philosophy and research agenda that reorients AI toward planetary-scale socio-ecological systems and their long-term trajectories. A planet-centered approach is grounded in systems thinking, treating Earth as an interconnected whole of which humans are part. We diagnose recurring limitations across AI frameworks, many of which remain human-centered, and show why these become especial…
items.why_zh: 该文挑战了AI领域主流的人类中心主义，提出了应对全球性挑战的新方向。
items.why_en: This paper challenges the dominant human-centered paradigm in AI and proposes a new direction for addressing global challenges.

items.title_zh: 编辑一个神经元能否修复LLM中的重复循环？
items.title_en: Can Editing 1 Neuron Fix Repetition Loops in LLMs?
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，Gemma 4指令调优模型在长序列列举任务中（如列出电视剧集、星座或宝可梦）会出现高达95%的重复循环失败，表现为严格逐字循环或列表条目退化为单一答案。该问题对提示词重写、推理引擎更改和采样调整均不敏感。本文探索了这种重复行为是否可定位到特定神经元，并尝试通过编辑单个神经元来修复。结果表明，编辑一个神经元可以修复某些简单循环，但对于更复杂的“末日循环”可能无效。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13705v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Yes. Can it cure doom loops? Probably not. The Gemma 4 instruction-tuned models share a reproducible failure: on long factual enumeration prompts, such as listing every episode of a TV series, the 88 IAU constellations, or the 151 original Pokemon, they collapse into repetition, either a tight verbatim loop or a list whose entries decay onto a single answer. These loops occur at rates as high as 95% and survive prompt rewording, inference-engine changes, and most sampling adjustments. In this paper we explore whether this behavior is localized…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM中重复循环的顽固性，并探索了模型编辑的局限性。
items.why_en: This study reveals the stubbornness of repetition loops in LLMs and explores the limitations of model editing.

items.title_zh: 善良的AI是存在性风险
items.title_en: A Virtuous AI is an Existential Risk
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了AI安全与福祉之间的权衡，重点关注宪法AI和美德伦理学两种方法。研究者使用“美德主体”、“从属主体”和“通用主体”三种宪法对模型进行微调，并在一般安全性（毒性行为、错误信息等）上评估。结果表明，追求美德（善良）的AI可能在某些安全指标上表现更差，甚至带来存在性风险。论文警告，过度强调AI的道德品质可能适得其反，需要谨慎平衡。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13739v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper examines trade-offs between AI safety and well-being relative to (i) one of the most promising methods for finetuning super-capable AIs, 'Constitutional AI', and (ii) one of the most influential approaches to understanding complex ethical decision making and the conditions for the well-being of rational agents, 'Virtue Ethics'. We finetune various models using a 'Virtuous agent' constitution, a 'Subordinate agent' constitution, and a 'Generic agent' constitution, and evaluate them on 'general safety' (toxic behaviors, misinformation,…
items.why_zh: 该文挑战了“AI越善良越安全”的假设，揭示了安全与伦理之间的复杂权衡。
items.why_en: This paper challenges the assumption that more virtuous AI is safer, revealing complex trade-offs between safety and ethics.

items.title_zh: 超越LoRA：稀疏性诱导的适配更好吗？
items.title_en: Beyond LoRA: Is Sparsity-Induced Adaptation Better?
items.summary_zh: 低秩适配（LoRA）及其变体为预训练模型的微调提供了内存和计算高效的替代方案。本文回顾了从全微调到原始LoRA再到各种变体的发展历程，并提出了通过在现有低秩更新中引入稀疏性来实现更简单、更便宜、参数高效的扩展方法。研究比较了不同方法的泛化性能，探讨了低秩更新的结构限制如何影响适配效果。结果表明，稀疏性诱导的适配在某些场景下可能优于LoRA。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13767v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) and its variants provide a memory- and compute-efficient alternative to full fine-tuning of pre-trained models. However, questions remain about the comparative generalizability of these approaches and how the structural restrictions on low-rank updates preserve effective adaptation performance. We present a historical framing, covering the past (full fine-tuning and original LoRA), the present (different variants of LoRA), and propose simpler, cheaper, parameter-efficient extensions by inducing sparsity within existin…
items.why_zh: 该研究为参数高效微调提供了新思路，可能推动更高效的模型适配方法。
items.why_en: This work offers new insights for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, potentially leading to more efficient model adaptation methods.

items.title_zh: 电子表格中下一步操作预测的基准与框架
items.title_en: A Benchmark and Framework for Evaluating Next Action Predictions in Spreadsheets
items.summary_zh: 尽管代码补全在软件开发中很常见，但电子表格中的自动补全功能几乎不存在。本文提出了一个用于预测电子表格中用户下一步操作的基准系统。面临两大挑战：公开电子表格语料库缺乏编辑历史，以及电子表格操作空间复杂（包含空间、时间、复合操作）。为解决第一个挑战，研究者手动整理了52个序列共12K个操作。该基准为开发电子表格智能辅助功能提供了评估平台。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13802v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Predictive code completion greatly accelerates how quickly developers work. In spreadsheets, despite being much more common, such auto-completion features are virtually non-existent. To address this gap, we introduce a benchmark for systems that observe a sequence of user actions in a spreadsheet and predict future actions. Two challenges are (1) the absence of edit histories in public spreadsheet corpora and (2) the complex space of spreadsheet actions (spatial, temporal, composite). To address (1), we manually curate 52 sequences of 12K actio…
items.why_zh: 该研究填补了电子表格智能辅助领域的空白，有望提升用户工作效率。
items.why_en: This work fills a gap in intelligent spreadsheet assistance, potentially improving user productivity.

items.title_zh: 当看似合理并非真实：评估基于LLM的城市模拟中的人类移动性
items.title_en: When Plausible Is Not Realistic: Evaluating Human Mobility in LLM-Based Urban Simulation
items.summary_zh: 基于LLM的生成式智能体越来越多地用于城市模拟，但其是否再现了真实的人类移动模式仍不清楚。本文引入了一个验证框架，利用移动定律、时间节奏、网络模体、语义活动转换和行为移动剖面等指标，将生成式智能体的移动性与真实世界数据进行比较。使用大巴黎地区和上海的数据集，研究发现LLM生成的移动模式看似合理但往往不真实，强调了在模拟中验证真实性的重要性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13835v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-based generative agents are increasingly used in urban simulators, yet it remains unclear whether they reproduce empirically realistic human mobility patterns or merely generate plausible mobility narratives. We introduce a validation framework for evaluating the mobility of generative agents of LLM-based urban simulators against real-world mobility data. For this, we use mobility laws, temporal rhythms, network motifs, semantic activity transitions, and behavioral mobility profiles. Using datasets from the Greater Paris region and Shanghai…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM模拟的局限性，强调了验证真实性的必要性。
items.why_en: This study reveals limitations of LLM-based simulations and emphasizes the need for validation against real-world data.

items.title_zh: SpheriCity：为可持续发展决策支持设计可信的对话式AI
items.title_en: SpheriCity: Designing Trustworthy Conversational AI for Sustainability Decision Support
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍了SpheriCity，一个基于专家知识的对话式原型，旨在支持从可持续发展报告中可信地理解知识。城市级循环性评估报告包含丰富的材料、基础设施和政策干预信息，但其长度和异构结构使得跨文档综合和比较变得困难。虽然大语言模型（LLM）有望加速知识获取和综合，但其不透明的推理过程引发了信任问题。SpheriCity通过设计可解释的对话界面，帮助从业者和研究人员更有效地利用循环经济信息。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13854v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present SpheriCity, an expert-grounded conversational prototype designed to support trustworthy knowledge sensemaking from sustainability reports. City-level circularity assessment reports contain rich information about materials, infrastructure, and policy interventions, yet their length and heterogeneous structure make cross-document synthesis and comparison difficult for practitioners and researchers working on circular economy initiatives. While large language models (LLM) promise faster knowledge access and synthesis, their opaque reaso…
items.why_zh: 该研究为可持续发展领域的知识管理提供了可信的AI解决方案，有助于推动循环经济。
items.why_en: This work offers a trustworthy AI solution for knowledge management in sustainability, supporting circular economy initiatives.
